metadata.title: Spreadsheet | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered spreadsheet platform integrated with your ERP — from collaborative sheets and smart formulas to live dashboards and real-time ERP data sync.

hero.title: Decisions,
hero.description: Adon ERP Spreadsheet turns business data into live reports, collaborative planning sheets, and real-time dashboards without endless copy-paste.

connectSection.title: No more copy/paste.
connectSection.subtitle: Real-time data.
connectSection.description: Connect your ERP modules directly to spreadsheets and build live business views from CRM, projects, inventory, finance, and sales.

pivotSection.title: Your business’s pivot
pivotSection.description: Create dynamic pivot tables from ERP records and instantly reveal what matters: profitability, stock movement, sales performance, and team productivity.
features: Group data by customer, product, region, or team
Refresh reports without exporting CSV files

visualizeSection.title: Visualize, decide,
visualizeSection.description: Build beautiful dashboards from spreadsheet data and keep every report connected to your live Adon ERP workspace.

list.title: Collaborative sheets
list.description: Work with your team in real time with controlled access and shared views.

list.title: Smart formulas
list.description: Create calculations faster with formula suggestions and reusable logic.

list.title: Live dashboards
list.description: Turn spreadsheet data into reports, charts, and business dashboards.

list.title: Data validation
list.description: Keep every cell clean with dropdowns, rules, and approval-ready checks.

list.title: ERP data sync
list.description: Connect sales, inventory, finance, and projects without copy-paste.

list.title: Secure sharing
list.description: Share reports safely with role-based access and protected ranges.

ctaBanner.title: Join growing teams
ctaBanner.description: Finance, sales, and operations teams use Adon ERP Spreadsheet to plan faster and report smarter.

footerCta.title: Unleash your
footerCta.subtitle: growth potential
footerCta.description: Replace disconnected sheets with live ERP-powered spreadsheets built for smarter decisions.
